title: Loqor's Weeping Angels
description: A simple Weeping Angels mod for Fabric 1.20.1 based on the creatures from Doctor Who. Don't. Blink.
body: ![Loqor's Weeping Angels Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e67d3665f37232c27da2c5136d337a403bc0c81.png) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loqors-weeping-angels) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/loqors-weeping-angels) [](https://fabricmc.net/) For Fabric 1.20.1 currently, will be updated/downgraded to other versions and loaders in the future if received well enough. _**A simple Weeping Angels mod to use with Adventures in Time or whatever mod your heart desires! But remember, don't blink. **_ **Angels will creep up on you from the forests and caves in the Overworld, and from (almost) anywhere in the Nether and the End. You can easily outpace them, but where there is one angel, there will be another - don't blink, and don't turn your back. They will teleport you and feed off of your life force.** ![Angel Sunset](https://i.imgur.com/S7dmdtq.jpeg)
